name: Cockroach
description: The Cockroach is a Tier 2 neutral creature in Grounded 2. It usually prowls around trash, leftovers, and dirty corners, either alone or alongside nymphs. It does not seek fights, but once provoked it becomes extremely dangerous.
behavior: It moves with an uneven cadence and rarely stays still for long. It does not sleep or stop to feed like many other creatures; it simply loops through its territory, always ready to react.
interactionWithPlayer: It is usually neutral toward the player, but it turns hostile if you attack another cockroach, a nymph, or the nearby queen. Once the fight starts it stops being a nuisance and becomes a real threat, especially if it revives headless.
interactionWithCreatures: It tends to ignore most creatures, but reacts immediately when a nearby nymph enters combat. In tighter spaces, that chain reaction can flood the area with enemies before you have time to reposition.
strategy: Cut off its escape route and avoid fighting it where more cockroaches can join in. If it revives decapitated, treat it like an improvised second phase and do not drop your guard until it finally stays down.

combatStats.attackDamageSummary: Bite: 30. 3-Hit Combo Bite: 25. Side Kick: 25. Headless Ram: 25.

abilities.name: Bite
abilities.description: A quick basic attack at close range.

abilities.name: 3-Hit Combo Bite
abilities.description: It chains several short bites together if you stay in front of it for too long.

abilities.name: Side Kick
abilities.description: A quick side hit used to cover its flanks.

abilities.name: Headless Ram
abilities.description: Rushes forward with its whole body to knock you off balance.

bossPhases.label: Phase 1
bossPhases.summary: While it still has its head, the cockroach pressures with quick bites and side kicks to keep you pinned in front of its body.

abilities.name: Bite
abilities.description: A quick basic attack at close range.

abilities.name: 3-Hit Combo Bite
abilities.description: It chains several short bites together if you stay in front of it for too long.

abilities.name: Side Kick
abilities.description: A quick side hit used to cover its flanks.

bossPhases.label: Phase 2
bossPhases.summary: Once it goes headless it becomes clumsier, but also much more linear and dangerous if you let it charge through a corridor.
bossPhases.trigger: Begins once the cockroach loses its head and enters its headless stretch.

abilities.name: Headless Ram
abilities.description: Rushes forward with its whole body to knock you off balance.
